data.name: Milker Clicker
data.detailed_description:
Click. Upgrade. Unlock. Interact.

A short, focused NSFW Clicker/Resource Management game where your only goal is to milk the cowgirl. Tap, click, and upgrade to produce milk and money - then spend your hard-earned tokens to unlock interactive sex scenes in which you will click some more!

This is not a complex simulator. This is a game about numbers going up, one click at a time.

What to expect:

  • 🔓 9 Unlockable sex scenes — Fully animated and interactive

  • 🐄 Milking & resource loop — Click to collect milk, earn money, and spend tokens

  • 💦 Scene interactivity — Tap for soft, hold for intense, build the climax meter

  • 🕒 About one hour of playtime — Focused and complete experience

  • ❌ No dialogue, no story — Just clicking, collecting, and more clicking

data.short_description: Adult-Only Clicker game about milking. Collect milk, earn money, and unlock 9 fully animated, interactive sex scenes. Simple mechanics, addictive rhythm - no story, just raw satisfaction.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: any x86_64 CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with full OpenGL 3.3 support
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: x86_32 CPU with SSE2 instructions
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with full OpenGL 3.3 support
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: any x86_64 CPU
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated graphics with full OpenGL 3.3 support
  • Storage: 300 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 16.04
  • Processor: x86_32 CPU with SSE2 instructions
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated graphics with full OpenGL 3.3 support
  • Storage: 300 MB available space
